nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Mourning warbler
nodes.summary: Mourning warbler（Mourning warbler，学名 Geothlypis philadelphia），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In the Appalachians and northernmost parts of their range, they are known to seek out habitat at higher elevations. The clearings are usually occupied after 1–2 years of regeneration, though some Mourning warblers have been captured in areas 3–6 years after logging. After 7 years or so, the habitat becomes too overgrown for breeding mourning warblers. While they often occupy similar habitat to their breeding habitat in the winter, they have also been known to occupy scrublands, dry woods, coasts and urban areas outside of their breeding season which contrasts with their breeding season preferences
